summary: Comprehensive testing of AgriPOS Sales Order system completed. Backend APIs fully functional (15/15 tests passed), frontend UI functional with smart product search working and all major pages accessible.

ui_bugs.issue: Save Invoice button occasionally experiences overlay interception preventing clicks

integration_issues.issue: Invoice creation requires valid product_id - manual text entry shows 'Add at least one product' error
integration_issues.workaround: Must use smart product search to select products rather than manual entry

design_issues.issue: Console shows hydration warnings for span elements inside tbody/tr structure

passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Smart product search API (/api/products/search-detail) returns product details
Smart product search dropdown appears with 'lann' query
Invoice prefixes and terms options loading
Invoice payment recording with interest computation
Sales Order page header form (Customer, Terms, Prefix dropdowns)
Line items table with Excel-style input fields
Footer calculations (freight, discount, amount paid, balance)
Navigation to all key pages (Sales Order, Payments, Fund Management)
Repack auto-compute capital functionality in search results
